advantages: Lazy iterator tools keep memory flat over huge or infinite streams.
Composable, well-tested building blocks reduce custom loop code.
lru_cache delivers big speedups for repeated deterministic work with one line.
partial and reduce express common functional patterns cleanly.
disadvantages: Overuse can make code terse and hard to read versus a clear loop.
Lazy iterators are single-pass and easy to accidentally exhaust.
lru_cache on functions with unbounded inputs can grow memory; never cache impure functions.
reduce is often less readable than sum()/a comprehension/explicit loop.
